items.name: Botox, Xeomin & Daxxify
items.tagline: Neuromodulators to soften fine lines and wrinkles naturally.
items.description: MedSpa 501 offers Botox, Xeomin, and Daxxify — three leading neuromodulators that relax the muscles causing dynamic lines and wrinkles. Daxxify is the longest-lasting option at 6+ months. All treatments are customized for natural, refreshed results.

items.name: Dermal Fillers
items.tagline: Restore volume, smooth lines, and enhance facial contours.
items.description: Dermal fillers restore lost volume, smooth static lines, and enhance facial features including lips, cheeks, jawline, and under-eyes. Our providers use a conservative, artful approach for natural-looking results.

items.name: IV Nutrient Therapy
items.tagline: Replenish, hydrate, and energize from the inside out.
items.description: IV nutrient therapy delivers vitamins, minerals, and hydration directly into the bloodstream for full absorption. MedSpa 501 offers customized IV formulations designed in partnership with 501 Pharmacy.

items.name: Medical Weight Loss
items.tagline: GLP-1 and medically supervised weight loss programs.
items.description: MedSpa 501 offers medically supervised weight loss programs including GLP-1 based treatments. All programs are personalized and monitored by licensed providers for safe, sustainable results.

items.name: Facials & Microneedling
items.tagline: Advanced skin treatments for a healthy, radiant complexion.
items.description: MedSpa 501 offers HydraFacials, customized facials, and microneedling (SkinStylus) to improve skin texture, tone, hydration, and radiance. Treatments are tailored to your specific skin type and concerns.

items.name: PRF
items.tagline: Platelet-rich fibrin for natural skin rejuvenation and hair restoration.
items.description: PRF uses your body's own growth factors to stimulate collagen, improve skin quality, and support hair restoration. A natural regenerative treatment with no synthetic additives and progressive results over weeks.
